creator: patpr@davenulle.org
text:
Edwin Groothuis :

> > >Synopsis:       port frozenbubble-2.0.0_1 : Missing RUN_DEPENDS to
> > > devel/p5-Locale-gettext
>
> I think this got fixed with ports/105376:
>
> Update to version _2 and see if it fixes it.

Yes, this is a duplicate of ports/105376. My apologies.

There is a typo in the pkg-message :
$ LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libc_r.so frozen-bubble

I think it should be :
$ env LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libc_r.so frozen-bubble

Thanks.
